methods.description: This method involves creating age-depth models for sediment cores using two different interpolation techniques: linear interpolation and smoothing spline. These models help in understanding sedimentation rates and chronological relationships in sediment cores.

steps.description: Create age-depth models using the R-code CLAM version 2.2.
steps.searchable_summary: use CLAM R package to create age-depth models

steps.description: Apply linear interpolation method to connect control points with straight lines.
steps.searchable_summary: apply linear interpolation to control points

steps.description: Use smoothing spline with a default smoothing factor of 0.3 for age model creation.

methods.description: This method involves using Optically Stimulated Luminescence (OSL) to date sediment cores, providing a chronology for periods where other dating methods may not be applicable.

steps.description: Use OSL to date sediment cores at Ciama 2 in Brazil and Potrok Aike lake in Patagonia.
steps.searchable_summary: apply OSL dating to sediment cores

steps.description: Combine OSL with tephra and 14C to establish chronology for Potrok Aike lake.
steps.searchable_summary: integrate OSL, tephra, and 14C for chronology

methods.description: This method outlines the process of correcting and reporting radiocarbon (14C) data, including mass fractionation corrections and reservoir age adjustments, to ensure accurate chronological data.

steps.description: Apply δ13C-based correction for mass fractionation with a default value of −25 ‰.
steps.searchable_summary: apply δ13C correction for mass fractionation

steps.description: Implement marine reservoir correction using a global ocean reservoir correction of c. 400 years.

methods.description: This method involves generating and evaluating age models for pollen records using updated calibration curves and assessing their temporal resolution and quality.

steps.description: Extract sites from Neotrop-ChronDB and recalibrate control points to rebuild age models.
steps.searchable_summary: recalibrate control points and rebuild age models

steps.description: Evaluate age models using the star classification system based on temporal uncertainty analysis.
steps.searchable_summary: evaluate age models with star classification
